feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Kanji Characters not visible when using Microsoft Edge Browser with FIORI App ME23N
entry.content:
Hello,

 

SAP recommends the MS Edge Browser when working with S/4HANA FIORI Apps.
When we use the Print Preview of a Purchase Order, containing Kanji Characters, with the FIORI App ME23N in MS Edge, the the Kanji Characters are there, but not visible.
Doing the same with Firefox Browser the Characters are visible.

entry.title: Maintenance Plan has plan dt too far in the future. last complete 6/2024 next dt 09/2026
entry.content:
the Maintenace plan is a strategy plan on a 4Mo, YYR cycle.

The last order was completed 6/13/2024 the next plan date is 10/1/2026  to be called 9/13/2026

I have attached images of the scheduling list

entry.title: Automatic assignment of decimals zeros for specific fields in QM - Inspection plan Migration Object
entry.content:
When migrating quality inspection plans from SAP EECC to SAP S/4HANA, the decimal values in the numeric fields of the quantitative inspection characteristics are not preserved. During the migration of the inspection plan, the value 10 is automatically assigned in the decimal field (STELLEN) for each characteristic, and 7 zeros are added to the right of the numeric values (SOLLWERT, TOLERANZUN, TOLERANZOB).

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Replacement of function module - SD_CREDIT_EXPOSURE in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

The customer was using the function module SD_CREDIT_EXPOSURE in the ECC system. However, its obsolete in S/4HANA. If you may please suggest the replacement of this function module in S/4HANA. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Link sales orders to contracts in bulk for Data Migration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have query regarding data migration. Actually, during Sales order migration, we are not able to link the sales order contract number in the sales order. There is no field for the contract in the template of the sale order. We have uploaded the Sales order via migration cockpit. In order to, link the Contract number in the Sales Order we have planned to use LSMW but unfortunately it is not working properly. 

It will be very hard to do this activity manually from VA02 since the volume is high. 

So, can we add the sales contract of a sales order in bulk?

Thank you.

entry.title: PAL change documents functionality in 1909 version
entry.content:
As per the note 2691783 - FAQ: Product Allocation Check (PAL) with aATP the PAL change documents functionality will be provided with OP2023. Seems like due to the high technically complexity the functionality cannot be down ported to lower product versions.

As we are using S/4 HANA 1909 version, please do let  us know, if there are any other alternative approaches in retrieving the change logs.

entry.title: material withdrawal based on the Process / Production order
entry.content:
Peace be upon you all, 

Scenario :

My Client want to do a withdrawal of the BOM components BASED on the process order avaibility check ( The missing part list ) in other terms based on the Pick list he will do the ( reservation / transfert ) of the BOM components.

*** I'll provide more details if required. (MTO-STYLE ;~)  ) 


Please need help AS SOON AS POSSIBLE !!!

Thanks in Advance 

M.Alaadin

entry.title: Changing field value for "Assigned To" in Work Order Operation in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is there any other configuration that needs to be checked that will allow me to change the "assigned to" value in the work order? 

Config. in backend

SSAM operation page/screen

Upon click on edit (pen) icon

As you can see I do not get the field in the edit to update the "Assigned To" field.

 

Any help on this is much appreciated.

entry.title: 3rd Party extension in SAP system (DABEXP 140)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying to establish which SAP module / team is utlising a particular add-on. The add on is DABEXP 140 and it was identified in our SAP readiness report. We are moving for ECC 6 to S/4HANA and this add on was under the heading: "Add-ons which are Certified Third-Party Software Available". 

No one seems to know what this add on is for. How do I get to the bottom of this? All I know is this is the vendor's website: https://www.dab-europe.com/

@everyone 

Kind Regards

Michelle

entry.title: WBS settlement rule is duplicated when BAPI K_SRULE_SAVE_UTASK is ejecuted
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Please help me.
When I create a WBS settlement rule using BAPI K_SRULE_SAVE_UTASK it is created correctly in COBRA and COBRB tables. however, when I verify the settlement rule in transaction CJ20N in update mode it is duplicated in all available lines. When I enter cj20n in view mode I see it correctly.

entry.title: Offsetting Account determination of financial document
entry.content:
Hi All,

As I know, there is logic for determinate the offsetting account of financial document. It will take the largest value of it's corresponding side. (Credit -> Debit,   Debit -> Credit)

 

 

But is it possible to get the offsetting account by the same amount in corresponding side?

which like the pairing below instead of mapping to itself.

entry.title: How can I auto close the MM & FI Period in SAP Hana 1709?
entry.content:
We have a requirement that at the end of every month we need to close the MM & FI period with some scheduler but the same period should be open for the specific users (i.e. Finance & Accounts team members) which again to be closed on 8th of every month.

Is there any default configuration available in SAP?

entry.title: Questions about the S/4HANA build process
entry.content:
Question.
I am currently looking to build an on-premise environment (TDD version) of S/4 HANA for our company, but we are having trouble understanding the steps to build it.
In the service license document, it says to create a license key and download the software from Manage My Services, but I don't know what license key and software correspond to the service (SAP Test and Demo User, starter package) that is currently activated.
I also do not know how to use the license key, so I would appreciate it if you could tell me how to use it.

Current status
I have a contract with SAP Test and Demo User, starter package (TD_7016852),
I am trying to build TDD version of S/4HANA on-prem environment.
I am using SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP 6 as the operating system and have the environment to install the software.

I am also trying things out about the license key and software,
The license key is
Product of Installation Number : SAP S/4 HANA
Add New System
Product SAP S/4 HANA
Version SAP S/4 HANA, on-premise edition 1511
as a license key.

In addition, as the software
SAP S/4 HANA / SAP S/4 HANA 2023/
SAP HANA PLATFORM EDITION 2.0 (INSTALLATIONS AND UPGRADES)
I am trying to install the software.

I have already confirmed that I can download the software from the SAP Download Manager regarding the software installation.
I would greatly appreciate it if someone could give me an answer to my question.

entry.title: Rejection/ Reminder for RFQ's via Fiori using BRF+ output management
entry.content:
We are facing an issue in SAP fiori where one of the requirement is to send reminder/rejection email to suppliers for RFQ. It seems that this is not a standard functionality. 

 

Therefore, we thought about setting the output type in dispatch time 2 (scheduled) and try to force the sending by clicking on send output in application"Manage RFQ". The button remain grayed out and the status is either in preparation or to be output even after trying to use the app manage output items.

 

Is there any solution to force reminder/rejection email sending to suppliers?

entry.title: How to plan configurable material in pMRP
entry.content:
I am trying to plan configurable material in pMRP. Have done all required setting of strategy  groups to planning BOM. Maintained inactive PIR also but I am getting below waring message and job is getting failed.

Please suggest.

entry.title: Possible to enter Business Partner order address as vendor in purchasing document
entry.content:
We have different business partners for regular vendors and for contact persons that only serve as an ordering address (if it deviates from the regular vendor).

These business partners are linked via customer/vendor integration with different vendor account groups.

The account group that is assigned to the ordering address business partners is not configured to be entered as a vendor in a purchasing document.

Nevertheless, this is still possible (which we don't want).

How can we prevent Business Partner Address being entered as a Delivery Address in the PO?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Cleansing case error stating Duplicate cleansing not active for D BUPA
entry.content:
After Creating a Duplicate Record in SAP S/4 Hana MDG system, I'm trying to create a cleansing case for the Duplicate Records but I am facing an Error Stating 'Duplicate cleansing not active for D BUPA'.

After clicking the Display Help and Followed the procedure as per the Display Help, But still the same Error is persisted.

Anyone can Help me with this.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Data issue in Standard CDS view 2CCFIFINSTMTKPI
entry.content:
Hi,

We have created dashboard on the standard CDS view 2CCFIFINSTMTKPI in SAC. We are facing a strange issue where EBITDA is not matching in 2 charts. The global currency is showing same as AUD.

Left chart- EBITDA (EBITDAAmountInGlobCrcy) is showing EBITDA value

Right chart-Amount in Global Currency (AmountInGlobalCurrency) is showing values for G/L account hierarchy, here we have selected EBITDA in the filter. So now, the chart show EBITDA value.

Ideally, these 2 charts should match with each other. The left chart value is matching with S/4.

entry.title: Implementation Single Sign-On for Web UIs for S/4HANA Cloud private edition
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Could you please assist me by providing detailed step-by-step guide documents for implementing Single Sign-On for Web UIs, specifically for option 5 mentioned below?

I have SAP IAS

entry.title: In ME22N when advance amount is changed in PO Release strategy is not re triggering for re-release.
